title: Erratum: Adult IgE-mediated food allergy is on the rise: A review of phenotypes, pathophysiologic mechanisms, diagnosis, and advances in managements.

abstract: Corrected name of the review article should be: Adult IgE-mediated food allergy is on the rise: Prevalence, phenotypes, pathophysiologic mechanisms, diagnosis, and advances in management.
